metrics_used.claim_boundary: Context packet gate validation over adversarial fixtures.

metrics_used.claim_boundary: Proof paths include source spans in the context packet gate.

metrics_used.claim_boundary: Clean-context score derived as 100 * (1 - distractor_ratio) for the context packet gate.

metrics_used.name: Cold proof build
metrics_used.claim_boundary: Cold proof-build-only timing from the Intended Tool Quality Gate; this is the remaining blocker.

caveats: The Intended Tool Quality Gate remains FAIL because proof_build_only_ms exceeds the 60,000 ms target.
CGC comparison remains diagnostic/blocked/incomplete; no CodeGraph-vs-CGC superiority claim is made.
Manual relation precision is sampled precision only; recall is unknown without a false-negative gold denominator.
Absent proof-mode relations are not plotted and have no precision claim.
macOS is coming soon, not currently tested, and has no CI coverage.
